top_stocks.description:
• Alamos Gold is a mid-to-large cap gold producer focused on operations in Canada and Mexico, including the Island Gold and Mulatos mines.
• The company operates as a diversified gold exploration and development entity with a significant market position in the Americas region.
• Alamos Gold is known for its robust balance sheet and high-return growth initiatives, recently completing a Phase 3+ Shaft Expansion.
top_stocks.latest_news:
• Reported record free cash flow of $352 million for the year ended December 31, 2025.
• Announced a 60% increase in its annual dividend payout.
• Sold Turkish projects for up to $470 million and incorporated those proceeds into total liquidity of approximately $1.2 billion.
• Reported a 32% increase in mineral reserves, bringing total reserves to 15.9 million ounces.
top_stocks.why_selected:
• Valuation: With a P/E of 25.02 and a PEG of 0.42, the stock is trading at a reasonable valuation that reflects growth potential.
• Profitability: Strong metrics with an ROE of 22
